Publications
  • (2022) Judith Degen, Stefan Pophristic. The role of production expectations in visual world paradigm linking hypotheses. Proceedings of the 44th Annual Conference of the Cognitive Science Society. 44(1).
  • (2021) Stefan Pophristic, Kathryn Schuler. The role of gender in the acquisition of the Serbian case system. Proceedings of the Linguistic Society fo America. 6(1): 896-905.

Talks
  • (2025) Stefan Pophristic. Inflectional class level phonotactics affect lexical access of Spanish verbal stems. Stony Brook, Yale, NYU, CUNY (SYNC) Conference (CUNY, NYC).
  • (2022) Judith Degen, Stefan Pophristic. The role of production expectations in visual world paradigm linking hypotheses. Cognitive Science Society Annual Conference (Toronto, Canada).

Posters
  • (2026) Stefan Pophristic. Inflectional class phonotactics affect lexical access. Human Sentence Processing (HSP) (MIT Boston, USA).
  • (2025) Stefan Pophristic, Alec Marantz. Predictive Morphological Processing of Visual Words. Human Sentence Processing (HSP) (College Park, Maryland, USA).
  • (2025) Stefan Pophristic, Alec Marantz. Incremental versus Global visual word recognition in the M170. Society for Neurobiology of Language (SNL) (Washington D.C., USA).
  • (2024) Stefan Pophristic, Alec Marantz. Evidence for Transition Probability in Processing of Spanish Verbs. Architectures and Mechanisms for Language Processing (AMLAP) (Edinburgh, Scotland).
  • (2022) Stefan Pophristic et al.. Pragmatic use of morphological information in Serbo-Croatian redundant referring expression production. 9th Experimental Pragmatics (XPrag) Conference (Pavia, Italy).
  • (2021) Stefan Pophristic, Kathryn Schuler. The role of gender in the acquisition of the Serbian case system. LSA Annual Meeting (virtual).
Stefan Pophristic — PhD Student, Department of Linguistics, New York University
